name: boundaryml-baml
description: Official BAML plugin for Claude Code — lean, example-dense skills that teach Claude to write idiomatic BAML.

plugins.name: baml
plugins.description: Four example-dense skills: core (the typed language + the LLM DSL that desugars into it), bridges (calling BAML from a host language), serving (HTTP servers / long-lived processes around BAML), and testing (testset/test + token-free LLM testing via Fn$parse). Examples verified against the shipped CLI; defers to `baml describe` for everything else. Auto-triggers when Claude opens a .baml file or is asked how to install / use BAML.
